title: List of Heroes of the Russian Federation (Z)
rows: Igor Zadorozhny Russian : Игорь Сергеевич Задорожный
... courage and heroism displayed during the performance of a soldier 's duty in the North Caucasus region
Amir Zagayev Russian : Амир Абдуллахиевич Загаев
... courage and heroism displayed in the performance of civil administration in Vedensky District of the Chechen Republic
Zagid Zagidov Russian : Загид Асмалавович Загидов
... courage and heroism displayed during the liquidation of armed gangs in the North Caucasus region

... courage and heroism displayed during the performance of special operations under life-threatening conditions

... courage and heroism displayed during the performance of special operations

... courage and heroism displayed during a counterterrorism operation

... courage and heroism displayed during a counterterrorism operation in the North Caucasus region

... courage and heroism displayed during a counterterrorism operation in the North Caucasus region

... courage and heroism displayed during spaceflight on the orbital scientific research complex Mir

description: This table lists individuals who have been awarded the title 'Hero of the Russian Federation,' focusing on those whose last names start with 'Z.' It includes details about the recipients, the date the honor was conferred, whether it was awarded posthumously, and the reason for the recognition. The table serves to document and categorize these honors for historical or informational purposes.
